# The Berman Group — Energy Rating Platform

> The Berman Group operates three multi-tenant energy certification platforms across Europe: The Berman (Ireland), EPC Cert (England), and Certificado Energético (Spain). Each platform connects homeowners and businesses with registered energy assessors for fast, reliable energy rating certificates.

## Overview

- **Ireland**: The Berman — Building Energy Rating (BER) certificates and SEAI-registered assessors.
- **England**: EPC Cert — Energy Performance Certificates (EPC) and accredited assessors nationwide.
- **Spain**: Certificado Energético — Certificados de Eficiencia Energética (CEE) and certificadores acreditados.

## Platform Structure

### Public Pages
- `/` — Homepage with hero, search, and assessor directory
- `/about` — Company story, mission, and team
- `/services` — Energy rating services offered
- `/pricing` — Transparent pricing information
- `/contact-us` — Contact form and support
- `/catalogue` — Business and assessor directory
- `/locations` — County and town landing pages
- `/faq` — Frequently asked questions
- `/news` — Industry news and updates
- `/blog` — Educational articles on energy efficiency
- `/hire-agent` — Book an assessor directly
- `/get-quote` — Request a quote for assessment

### User Pages
- `/login` — Account login
- `/signup` — User registration
- `/dashboard/user` — Homeowner dashboard
- `/dashboard/ber-assessor` — Assessor dashboard
- `/dashboard/business` — Business partner dashboard
- `/forgot-password` — Password recovery
- `/update-password` — Password reset

### Admin Pages
- `/login/admin` — Admin login
- `/admin` — Admin dashboard (users, leads, assessments, payments)
- `/admin/news/new` — Create news article
- `/admin/news/edit/:id` — Edit news article
- `/admin/blog/new` — Create blog post
- `/admin/blog/edit/:id` — Edit blog post

## Technical Stack

- **Frontend**: React 19, Vite, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript
- **Backend**: Supabase (Postgres, Auth, Edge Functions)
- **Payments**: Stripe
- **Maps**: Leaflet with OpenStreetMap
- **SEO**: react-helmet-async, prerendered static HTML, JSON-LD schema
- **Hosting**: Vercel with SPA routing and static file serving
- **Domains**:
  - `theberman.eu` (Ireland)
  - `epccert.com` (England)
  - `certificadoenergético.eu` (Spain)

## Key Features

- Multi-tenant architecture with domain-based tenant detection
- Automated quote matching between homeowners and assessors
- Subscription-based assessor and business memberships
- Job board with SMS and email notifications
- Payment processing via Stripe
- Contact form with SMTP email delivery per tenant
- Google Analytics and Tag Manager integration

## Contact

- **Ireland**: hello@theberman.eu
- **England**: hello@epccert.com
- **Spain**: hello@certificadosenergetico.es
